$description: Solidigm UI icon atoms — canonical paths, size scale bindings, theme behavior, and animation specifications. Source-of-truth: Storybook LinkItem + Accordion components and AEM v3 styles.

size.$description: Icon size scale — tied to typographic rhythm. All values are square (width = height). Sourced from $iconSize map in _bootstrapOverrides.scss.

sm.$description: Default icon size. Arrow-double (mobile), accordion chevron (desktop), button icons.

lg.$description: Feature / hero icons. Requires brand approval for inline use.

arrowDouble.$description: The primary brand navigation icon — two right-pointing chevrons. Used on all link items, cards, and navigation CTAs. This is the most frequently appearing interactive icon on solidigm.com.

viewBox.$description: Canonical aspect ratio for the link / list-item context.

viewBoxCompact.$description: Square grid variant used in button background-image and modal close. Same geometry on a 24px unit grid.

assetPath.$description: currentColor variant — fill inherits from parent text color.

assetPathTeal.$description: Fixed Electric Teal fill variant — used in buttons and CTAs on dark/purple backgrounds.

dark.$description: Dark theme: white fill. Inherited from parent color via currentColor. Class: .theme-solidigm--dark

light.$description: Light theme: black fill. Inherited from parent color via currentColor. Class: .theme-solidigm--light

button.$description: Button / CTA context: always Electric Teal regardless of background theme.

textArrowUtility.$description: .text--arrow CSS class: uses CSS mask-image + background-color. Default color is Solidigm Purple. Background-color can be overridden per context.

mobile.$description: 24px — set via map-get($iconSize, sm) on .list-item__icon svg

desktop.$description: 32px — set via map-get($iconSize, lg) on xl breakpoint (≥1280px)

hover.$description: On parent .list-item:hover — the icon container (.list-item__icon) translates right.

easing.$description: Paired with transition-timing-function: linear override in source. Use motion.standard.

hoverUnderline.$description: Simultaneously with icon nudge: the link text span::before expands from 0% to 100% width — an animated underline.

dark.$description: White underline on dark themes. .list-item__text span::before { background-color: $white }

light.$description: Black underline on light themes. Overridden via @include theme-light() in _linkItem.scss

chevronDown.$description: Accordion toggle chevron. Points down when closed, rotates 180° when open. Always Electric Teal — not theme-adaptive. Used exclusively in accordion triggers.

theme.$description: Chevron fill is hardcoded — it does not adapt to light/dark theme. The Electric Teal on dark/purple accordions is an intentional brand constant.

always.$description: Electric Teal. Equivalent to color.accent.electricTeal. Never changes regardless of parent theme class.

mobile.$description: 16px — map-get($iconSize, xs). Applied as width on <svg> element.

toggle.$description: On .accordionv3.open: the chevron rotates 180° to point upward, indicating expanded state.

contentReveal.$description: Accordion body expansion — all three properties transition together.

mobile.$description: $gap-mobile — space below trigger button before content.
$gap-mobile — gap between children inside expanded content.
